creator: vidar@karlsen.tech
text:
(In reply to Daniel Engberg from comment #7)
I tried with and without USES= ncurses when I was testing it, and the results looked the same to me (both linked with /lib/libncursesw.so.9) so I decided to go without it for simplicity.
But I might have missed something here. I didn't test with ncurses from ports.
